calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Set For Trial On Aug-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-AUG-07-2019 in Dept. 305:
Lawrence Mathews (T: 415.793.7696), Plaintiff / Respondent
Ronald Buggs (T: 510.689.9052), Defendant / Appellant

This cause comes on calendar, as assigned by the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206, for trial de novo. Both litigants and defendant's/appellant's witness Yvonne Pansoy are administered the witness oath. The Court has reviewed the case docket and both parties' exhibits (previously admitted into evidence).

Plaintiff/Respondent Lawrence Mathews testifies on his own behalf.
Defendant/Appellant Ronald Buggs testifies on his own behalf.
Yvonne Pansoy testifies on behalf of the Defendant/Appellant.

The Court takes this matter under submission. Court adjourns.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings Not Reported. (305)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Judgment Entered
